== Notes for [[Item:Q105324|Q105324]] ==

JOSE2 URIBE-Y-VERGARA-TOVAR (PEDRO1 URIBE-Y-VERGARA) was born in Wichapan, Mexico F.D., Mexico. He married MARIA DE-LA-CADENA-PACHECO, daughter of ANTONIO DE-LA-CADENA-BULLON and ISABEL PACHECO-DE-CONTRERAS. She was baptized on January 03, 1611 in Sagrario Metropolitano, Puebla de Zaragoza, Puebla, Mexico.

Children of JOSE URIBE-Y-VERGARA-TOVAR and MARIA DE-LA-CADENA-PACHECO are:

i. CAYETANO3 URIBE-DE-LA-CADENA-VERGARA.

ii. JOSE URIBE-DE-LA-CADENA-VERGARA.

iii. NICOLAS URIBE-DE-LA-CADENA-VERGARA.

3. iv. ANTONIO URIBE-DE-LA-CADENA-VERGARA, b. Wichapan, Mexico F.D., Mexico; d. May 27, 1678, Monterrey, Nuevo Leon, Mexico.

http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/uribe.htm
--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
_CRE DATE 30 SEP 2016 TIME 13:28:00

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000012654173870

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
